text:
Market today: The tech sector is buzzing with AI developments, with Amazon pushing AI gadgets and Micron central to the AI boom. This focus on AI is the main driver, suggesting continued interest in your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 28.7% and leveraged; its decay and your margin exposure make this drawdown extra painful. QQQI (-1.86%) is near its stop and needs watching. SPAL (-9.58%), a new leveraged ETF, also requires attention given its fast movement and your margin.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader chip sector, especially with Micron's AI narrative. Your scanner also flags SMH and XLK for potential long setups.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions tightly and stay alert to AI-driven tech momentum.
plays: SOXL: Consider exiting this leveraged position. It's significantly below its stop and the decay, amplified by margin, is a major drag.
QQQI: Watch the 52 stop closely; consider trimming if it breaks to protect capital.
SMH: Scanner shows a BUY setup. Consider an entry between 584.71-586.43 with a stop at 580.88, aligning with the chip sector's positive news.
